of American [reality](/wiki/Reality_television "Reality television") [dance competition](/wiki/Dance_competition "Dance competition") *[World of Dance](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(TV_series) "World of Dance (TV series)")* premiered May 30, 2017, on [NBC](/wiki/NBC "NBC"). [Jennifer Lopez](/wiki/Jennifer_Lopez "Jennifer Lopez"), [Ne-Yo](/wiki/Ne-Yo "Ne-Yo"), and [Derek Hough](/wiki/Derek_Hough "Derek Hough") served as the judges, with [Jenna Dewan](/wiki/Jenna_Dewan "Jenna Dewan") serving as host. Hip hop dancers [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins"), from Paris, France, were crowned as the winners of the $1,000,000 prize on August 8, 2017. Fourteen-year-old contemporary dancer [Eva Igo](/wiki/Eva_Igo "Eva Igo") and Latin/Swing group [Swing Latino](/wiki/Swing_Latino "Swing Latino") were named first runner-up and second runner-up respectively.

Despite their Qualifier performance not being shown, this act's hometown and dance style were made available on the *World of Dance* website. Therefore, these acts do not have a determined average score.
MiniRequest, Kings Unite & Rhythmatic were the only groups not to have a full performance featured during their time on the show.

The **first season** of American [reality](/wiki/Reality_television "Reality television") [dance competition](/wiki/Dance_competition "Dance competition") *[World of Dance](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(TV_series) "World of Dance (TV series)")* premiered May 30, 2017, on [NBC](/wiki/NBC "NBC"). [Jennifer Lopez](/wiki/Jennifer_Lopez "Jennifer Lopez"), [Ne-Yo](/wiki/Ne-Yo "Ne-Yo"), and [Derek Hough](/wiki/Derek_Hough "Derek Hough") served as the judges, with [Jenna Dewan](/wiki/Jenna_Dewan "Jenna Dewan") serving as host. Hip hop dancers [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins"), from Paris, France, were crowned as the winners of the $1,000,000 prize on August 8, 2017. Fourteen-year-old contemporary dancer [Eva Igo](/wiki/Eva_Igo "Eva Igo") and Latin/Swing group [Swing Latino](/wiki/Swing_Latino "Swing Latino") were named first runner-up and second runner-up respectively.

## The Duels

In each round of The Duels, two acts in the same division compete for a spot in the next round. In each division, the acts with the top qualifying scores choose their opponents, then both acts perform back-to-back, receiving feedback from the judges. ## World Final

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=World_of_Dance_season_1&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: World Final")]

In the World Final, the final 3 acts competed head to head to win the one million dollar prize. As with the previous 2 rounds, the judges became mentors for each of the finalists; Jennifer worked with Les Twins, Derek worked with Swing Latino and Ne-Yo worked with Eva. Each of the 3 finalists performed twice; The first performance's music was chosen by one of the judges and the second was chosen by the finalist. After each performance, the final scores were displayed on a leaderboard. The winner of the World Finals was determined by the judges combined average scores from both performances. After the final performances, Les Twins were announced as the winners of World of Dance; their final combined score of 93.9 just barely edged out Eva Igo by 0.2 points.

## Contestants who appeared on other shows

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=World_of_Dance_season_1&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Contestants who appeared on other shows")]

* Several members of various dance acts have competed on the American version of *[So You Think You Can Dance](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_(American_TV_series) "So You Think You Can Dance (American TV series)")*. Nick Young, founder of Rhythmatic, competed on [Season 8](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_(American_TV_series)_season_8 "So You Think You Can Dance (American TV series) season 8"), making the Top 20. Audrey Case of Royal Flux competed on [Season 9](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_(American_TV_series)_season_9 "So You Think You Can Dance (American TV series) season 9"), making the Top 10. Du-Shaunt "Fik-Shun" Stegall is the male winner of [Season 10](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_(American_TV_series)_season_10 "So You Think You Can Dance (American TV series) season 10"). Diana Pombo auditioned for [Season 13](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance:_The_Next_Generation_(American_TV_series) "So You Think You Can Dance: The Next Generation (American TV series)"), getting cut in the callbacks.
* Denys Drozdyuk of DNA is the winner of [Season 3](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_Canada_season_3 "So You Think You Can Dance Canada season 3") of *[So You Think You Can Dance Canada](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_Canada "So You Think You Can Dance Canada")*. DNA also auditioned for the US version in [Season 12](/wiki/So_You_Think_You_Can_Dance_(American_TV_series)_season_12 "So You Think You Can Dance (American TV series) season 12"), where both were eliminated in the callbacks.
* [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins") competed on Season 3 of [Incroyable Talent](/wiki/La_France_a_un_incroyable_talent "La France a un incroyable talent").
* [Jabbawockeez](/wiki/Jabbawockeez "Jabbawockeez") debuted on [Season 2](/wiki/America%27s_Got_Talent_(season_2) "America's Got Talent (season 2)") of *[America's Got Talent](/wiki/America%27s_Got_Talent "America's Got Talent")*. They were eliminated in the Las Vegas callbacks.
* Jabbawockeez & [Super Cr3w](/wiki/Super_Cr3w "Super Cr3w") have competed and won their respective seasons of *[America's Best Dance Crew](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew "America's Best Dance Crew")*. JabbaWockeez won [Season 1](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew_(Season_1) "America's Best Dance Crew (Season 1)") and Super Cr3w won [Season 2](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew_(Season_2) "America's Best Dance Crew (Season 2)").
* Kinjaz & Super Cr3w both competed on [Season 8](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew_(season_8) "America's Best Dance Crew (season 8)") of *[America's Best Dance Crew](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew "America's Best Dance Crew")*, reaching the finals (placing 2nd and 3rd respectively).
* [Ian Eastwood](/wiki/Ian_Eastwood "Ian Eastwood") of Ian Eastwood and the Young Lions competed as a member of Mos Wanted Crew on [Season 7](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew_(season_7) "America's Best Dance Crew (season 7)") of *[America's Best Dance Crew](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew "America's Best Dance Crew")*
* D'Angelo and Amanda appeared on [Season 8](/wiki/America%27s_Got_Talent_(season_8) "America's Got Talent (season 8)") of *[America's Got Talent](/wiki/America%27s_Got_Talent "America's Got Talent")*. They were eliminated after reaching the Top 12. Amanda also competed in *[Abby's Ultimate Dance Competition](/wiki/Abby%27s_Ultimate_Dance_Competition "Abby's Ultimate Dance Competition")* season 1 placing 4th.
* Nick Daniels appeared on *[Dance Moms](/wiki/Dance_Moms "Dance Moms")* as a part of the candy apples team.
